category_sources: Official README says httpstat visualizes curl statistics and timing breakdowns.
source_facts.description says httpstat makes curl statistics simple.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use httpstat.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo is the GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/reorx/httpstat; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README lists DNS, TCP, TLS, server processing, content transfer timing, JSON output, and SLO threshold features.
